chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-534 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objection No.1 to 4 as at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.07.2025 Mr. Fazil Rind, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Khan Tanoli, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zahoor Shah, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO, Karachi. Mr. Javed Farooqui, SDPO, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi. PI Jawed, P.S. Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Fazil Rind, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Khan Tanoli, Advocate for the petitioner. It is the case of the petitioners that the official respondents are causing harassment at the behest of respondent No.6 and the petitioners have apprehension that they will be booked into false cases. Replies have been filed by the SHO, P.S Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi East and SDPO, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi wherein it has been contended that no action in violation of law has been taken against the petitioners. Mr. Javed Ahmed Farooqui, SDPO Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi submits that the petitioner No.1 is involved in many cases and by filing this petition the petitioners intend to pressurize the police and intend to restrain them from conducting fair investigation. Since the petitioners have claimed the relief for protection and undue harassment caused by the official respondents, it is the obligatory duty of the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. It is expected that the police officials shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and will perform their duties as ordained under the law.

Since the petitioners have claimed the relief for protection and undue harassment caused by the official respondents, it is the obligatory duty of the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. It is expected that the police officials shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and will perform their duties as ordained under the law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
